block_01: Aware that the process of buying cryptos is not an easy one? All these difficulties are things of the past now. With the fast-growing interest in cryptocurrencies, our traders can trade CFDs* contracts on cryptocurrencies.
block_03: *CFD stands for “contract for difference,” a tradeable contract between a trader and the platform, who exchange the difference in the value of a trading instrument at the time of opening a transaction, and the value of that instrument at the contract’s end.
